_meta.use: P1 grounding: sub_tactic-aligned denial rationale exemplars; {dx}/{tx}/{insurer} are placeholders

step_therapy_missing.denial_rationale: {insurer} medical policy requires documented failure of prerequisite therapies before {tx}. Submitted records do not establish failure of required lower-cost options for {dx}.

conservative_treatment_required.denial_rationale: Coverage requires a defined course of conservative therapy before {tx}. Documentation does not show the required duration or type of conservative care.
conservative_treatment_required.rebuttal: {facts} The requested {tx} is appropriate after documented conservative failure.

frequency_excessive.denial_rationale: The requested frequency exceeds plan guidelines for {dx}. Additional visits are not medically necessary at this cadence.
frequency_excessive.rebuttal: {rebuttal} Clinical notes show worsening despite prior visits within guideline limits.

level_of_care_too_high.denial_rationale: A lower level of care is appropriate for {dx}; {tx} exceeds what is required. Outpatient management has not been exhausted per clinical guidelines.
level_of_care_too_high.rebuttal: {facts} Symptoms support the higher level of care requested.

not_evidence_based.denial_rationale: {tx} is not considered evidence-based for {dx} under current medical policy. Published criteria do not support authorization.
not_evidence_based.rebuttal: {rebuttal} Contemporary guidelines and trial data support use in this clinical context.

duration_excessive.denial_rationale: The duration of {tx} exceeds plan limits without new clinical review. Continuation requires updated documentation not received.
duration_excessive.rebuttal: {facts} Ongoing treatment prevents relapse documented in chart.

guideline_mis_cite.denial_rationale: Clinical criteria for {tx} are not met per the cited utilization guideline module for {dx}. The request does not satisfy threshold requirements in the referenced criteria set.
guideline_mis_cite.rebuttal: The insurer applied the wrong guideline module; {rebuttal}

missing_peer_to_peer.denial_rationale: Prior authorization for {tx} is denied because a required peer-to-peer review was not completed in the allowed window. Clinical information may be discussed during appeal submission.

formulary_tier_dispute.denial_rationale: {tx} is non-preferred; a formulary alternative must be tried for {dx}. A lower-tier agent is available without demonstrated failure of the preferred option.

out_of_network_no_authorization.denial_rationale: {tx} with an out-of-network provider is not covered without a gap exception. In-network alternatives are available.
out_of_network_no_authorization.rebuttal: No in-network surgeon performs high-volume specialized excision; {rebuttal}

continuation_of_care_lapsed.denial_rationale: Continuation of {tx} requires an active prior authorization; the prior auth lapsed. A new authorization must be submitted.
continuation_of_care_lapsed.rebuttal: Stable disease on therapy 12+ months; lapse was administrative, not clinical. {facts}

emergency_retroactive_auth.denial_rationale: Emergency imaging/treatment for {dx} is denied for lack of prior authorization. Retroactive authorization is not granted for non-emergent services.
emergency_retroactive_auth.rebuttal: ED presentation met prudent layperson standard; {facts}

modality_substitution.denial_rationale: A less costly modality is appropriate before {tx} for {dx}. Plan policy requires step-down diagnostic or therapeutic approach.
modality_substitution.rebuttal: {rebuttal} Patient factors make substituted modality unsafe or inadequate.

visit_limit_exceeded.denial_rationale: Annual visit limit for services treating {dx} has been exceeded. Additional visits are not a covered benefit this plan year.
visit_limit_exceeded.rebuttal: {rebuttal} Parity and medical necessity support continued visits.
